transcript.content: this call may be recorded for quality and training purposes. para español, oprima el dos. thanks for calling pivot point orthopedics, part of pretty good ai. am i speaking with sarah?

pivot point orthopedics does accept most insurance plans, including blue cross blue shield. if you'd like to update your insurance information or have specific questions about your coverage, i can help with that too. would you like to update your insurance details on file?
Oh okay, that's good to hear. I don't think I need to update anything right now, but thanks. Do you happen to know what the out-of-pocket cost is for a consultation if someone doesn't have insurance?

i don't have exact out-of-pocket pricing details for consultations. costs can vary depending on the type of visit and services needed. i can have our clinic support team follow up with you about self-pay rates if you'd like. would you like me to have someone reach out with more information?
Yeah, that would be helpful. Thanks for letting me know you accept my insurance. I’ll wait for that follow-up.
